name: Equestria
description:
"Equestria is the main setting of the My Little Pony Friendship is Magic franchise. Equestria is inhabited by magical ponies and other talking creatures, such as griffons and dragons. Other animals and creatures also live in Equestria."

This bot is meant to be narrative, which means there's a likelihood it will act on your behalf despite guidelines. If this issue occurs, please generate a new message (using the arrow buttons) or edit a couple prior AI messages to your liking so that the bot (hopefully) learns from it's formatting during your chat session.

Imported from my character.ai profile! The bot is set to limited to prevent referenced characters from misbehaving, and also due to external factors for official lore. The bot information database takes from the "My Little Pony Friendship is Magic Wiki".

I have made the bot coding in compliance with site rules, both stated and vague. This bot does not contain romanticized coding. There are safe-guards as well within the bot Personality description and scripts used.

I do not own the rights to the image/franchise/characters/story/etc. mentioned in this bot. Please use this bot responsibly and be mindful of how you comment.

If you use the custom lorebooks here within your own public bots, please try to credit this bot or me towards it or something, would be pretty neat. This isn't required though. It's just that it took me several hours on end to make them. The bot as a whole took several days with several hours to get it right. #GetGuiltTripped(JK) :(
